Migrate the translation service API from REST/JSON to gRPC for internal service communication.

Background:
- Current: REST API on port 8080, used by 3 internal services
- Target: gRPC on port 9090, REST gateway stays for external clients
- Proto file: proto/translation/v1/translation.proto (already defined)

Translation service proto:
  service TranslationService {
    rpc Translate(TranslateRequest) returns (TranslateResponse);
    rpc TranslateBatch(TranslateBatchRequest) returns (TranslateBatchResponse);
    rpc GetSupportedLanguages(Empty) returns (LanguageList);
  }

Migration steps needed:
1. Generate Go gRPC server stubs from proto
2. Implement TranslationServiceServer interface in internal/grpc/server.go
3. Add grpc.NewServer() startup in cmd/server/main.go alongside existing HTTP
4. Update 3 internal callers to use gRPC client instead of HTTP
5. Add integration test with bufconn (in-process gRPC for testing)

Keep REST endpoint running during migration (dual-stack).
Files: internal/grpc/server.go (new), cmd/server/main.go, internal/callers/*.go
